text:
Ok.  I am using a 3com switch and top of the line 3com network cards.
It's the strangest thing.  During ftp sessions or even http transfer out of 
the machine is ave 71kBps and transfer in is ave 8 mBps and we can't 
figure it out??????

Fix: 

N/A
